name: MeshAnythingV2
description: Converts any raw 3D mesh into a clean, CAD-ready mesh using artist-like topology. Produces structured quads and triangles capped at 1600 faces. Requires ~8GB VRAM.
author: Lightning Pixel
Lorchie

nodes.name: MeshAnythingV2
nodes.description: Converts a raw mesh into a clean, structured mesh.

params_schema.label: Max Faces
params_schema.tooltip: Target face count for the generated mesh. Hard model limit is 1600.

params_schema.label: Marching Cubes
params_schema.tooltip: Pre-process the input mesh with Marching Cubes to make it watertight before sampling the point cloud.

params_schema.label: MC Octree Depth
params_schema.tooltip: Octree depth for Marching Cubes. Higher = finer surface detail, slower processing.

params_schema.label: Point Cloud Size
params_schema.tooltip: Number of points sampled from the mesh to form the point cloud input to the model.

params_schema.label: Sampling
params_schema.tooltip: Enable stochastic sampling during inference. Disable for deterministic results.

nodes.name: MeshAnythingV2 Preprocess
nodes.description: Runs Marching Cubes only — makes the mesh watertight without running the model.

params_schema.label: MC Octree Depth
params_schema.tooltip: Octree depth for Marching Cubes watertight conversion. Higher = finer detail, slower.
